svg.text: var vs dynamic — type resolution timeline
extension methods — how the compiler translates

g.text: 1. Class must be static 2. Method must be static 3. First param uses "this"
public static int Reverse(this int number) { ... }

svg.text: anonymous types — what the compiler generates

g.text: with expression — creates a NEW object in memory
var em03 = emp with { Salary = 700 }; // emp.Salary still 5000, em03.Salary = 700
